title: HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: MOSAIC COMMUNITY HEALTH COURTNEY HEALTH CENTER HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, women's annual exams, STD screening and treatment, pediatric care, vaccinations, mental health evaluations and counseling services, and drug and alcohol assessment. Also offers assistance enrolling and re-enrolling in OHP. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Suite 100 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site Email (541) 383-3005 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 383-3005 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees and payment plans may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Deschutes County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Deschutes County Health Services building Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Mental Health Evaluation Pap Tests Pediatrics Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MOSAIC COMMUNITY HEALTH COURTNEY HEALTH CENTER
